subcodes.first_line: Glorified be God, our Lord, the Lord of the mighty Throne and our Master, the Master of the exalted Seat, Who hath sent forth the Messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله ربنا رب العرش العظیم و مالکنا و مالک الکرسی الرفیع قد ارسل الرسل
